title: Cotton Candy Clouds at Dawn
body:
This image depicts a dreamy, surreal sky filled with massive, soft clouds in shades of pink, lavender, and deep blue. The clouds look fluffy and layered, forming a vast, almost ocean-like landscape in the sky. Warm sunlight from a low sun on the horizon gently illuminates the clouds, creating a glowing, pastel atmosphere. The scene feels calm, magical, and ethereal, as if it shows a peaceful sunrise or sunset in a fantasy world above the clouds.
Works only with Optifine
